title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Phillips 66. One number. Every assumption disclosed.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale: Applying our 3.0% growth rate to the base FCF, here is how the cash generation looks over the next five years, and what those future dollars are worth today.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
